message:
⚡ Reduce skeleton flicker when navigating between dashboards (#495)

Two fixes to reduce visual flicker:

1. **Delayed skeleton display (100ms)**
   - Don't show skeleton immediately on mount
   - Wait 100ms before displaying skeleton
   - If cache loads within that time, skeleton never appears
   - This prevents brief skeleton flash when IndexedDB loads quickly

2. **Fix preloaded cache state**
   - Preloaded cache entries now start with correct state
   - Sets isLoading=false, isRefreshing=true for preloaded data
   - Prevents skeleton flash for preloaded cache keys

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
